initiatives.name: Abilene Community Fridge
initiatives.description: A mutual aid initiative providing free food access to the Abilene community through community fridges and food distribution networks.

initiatives.name: Abilene Big Country Hunger Coalition
initiatives.description: A bilingual coalition working to combat food insecurity in the Abilene area through community organizing, mutual aid, and resource coordination.

initiatives.name: Abilene Pride
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization providing mutual aid, community support, and resources to LGBTQ+ individuals in the Abilene area.

initiatives.name: West Texas Harm Reduction
initiatives.description: West Texas Harm Reduction Services Is a non-judgmental, non-coercive provision of services and resources to people who use drugs and the communities in which they live in order to assist them in reducing attendant harm.
